title: Em's Metal Detectors
description: A mod that aims to make mining less tedious! Create 3 metal detectors to help you locate ores!
body:
A Fabric 1.21.7 Mod Made for an SMP I am on!

There are 3 metal detectors in the mod! The metal detector detects iron ore, redstone ore, and diamond ore, within an 11x11x11 cube. The ancient debris and diamond detector detect their respective blocks within a 21x11x21 prism.

They are all made with 2 redstone dust in the bottom corners, a stick in the bottom middle, 4 copper ingots on the left and right sides, and a resonating core in the middle! the top middle item determines what it detects, with an iron ingot making a metal detector, a diamond making a diamond detector, and netherite scrap making an ancient debris detector. The resonating core is simply made using one amethyst shard, one redstone dust, and one diamond in any pattern.

Because this mod was made for a server and I am a beginner mod developer, this mod will not be ported to neoforge/forge and will most likely remain on 1.21.7! The source code, however is available for free on my github if you want to port it, just credit me if you do :p
